name: Adjectives for Emotions
description: Words to describe a wide range of human emotions and feelings

words.definition: Thinking that somebody/something is funny, so that you smile or laugh
words.example: She was amused by his funny stories.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy thấy buồn cười bởi những câu chuyện hài hước của anh ta.

words.definition: Feeling shame or guilt because of something you have done
words.example: He felt ashamed of his behavior at the party.
words.exampleVi: Anh ta cảm thấy hổ thẹn về hành vi của mình tại bữa tiệc.

words.definition: Very surprised
words.example: She was astonished to hear that she had won.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy kinh ngạc khi nghe tin mình đã thắng.

words.definition: Feeling embarrassed or uncomfortable
words.example: There was an awkward silence during the meeting.
words.exampleVi: Có một sự im lặng lúng túng trong suốt cuộc họp.

words.definition: Very confused
words.example: He had a bewildered look on his face.
words.exampleVi: Anh ta có vẻ mặt bối rối.

words.definition: Feeling angry and unhappy because of unfair treatment
words.example: She was bitter about the way she had been treated.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy cay đắng về cách mình bị đối xử.

words.definition: Extremely happy; showing happiness
words.example: They spent a blissful week by the ocean.
words.exampleVi: Họ đã dành một tuần cực kỳ hạnh phúc bên đại dương.

words.definition: Feeling tired and impatient because you are not interested
words.example: The children were bored on the long car journey.
words.exampleVi: Lũ trẻ cảm thấy chán nản trong chuyến đi ô tô dài.

words.definition: Not excited, nervous or upset
words.example: It is important to stay calm in an emergency.
words.exampleVi: Việc giữ bình tĩnh trong trường hợp khẩn cấp là rất quan trọng.

words.definition: Happy and showing it by your behavior
words.example: He is always cheerful, even on Monday mornings.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy luôn vui vẻ, ngay cả vào sáng thứ Hai.

words.definition: Feeling or showing sympathy for people who are suffering
words.example: She is known for her compassionate nature.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy nổi tiếng với bản tính thương cảm của mình.

words.definition: Feeling sure about your own ability to do things and be successful
words.example: She felt confident that she would pass the exam.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy cảm thấy tự tin rằng mình sẽ vượt qua kỳ thi.

words.definition: Unable to think clearly or to understand something
words.example: I'm still a bit confused about the new rules.
words.exampleVi: Tôi vẫn còn hơi bối rối về những quy tắc mới.

words.definition: Happy and satisfied with what you have
words.example: She was content to stay at home and read a book.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy hài lòng với việc ở nhà và đọc sách.

words.definition: Having a strong desire to know about something
words.example: The cat was curious about the cardboard box.
words.exampleVi: Con mèo tò mò về chiếc hộp các tông.

words.definition: Very pleased
words.example: I was delighted with my birthday present.
words.exampleVi: Tôi rất vui mừng với món quà sinh nhật của mình.

words.definition: Very sad and without hope
words.definitionVi: Thất vọng, chán nản, trầm cảm
words.example: He felt depressed after losing his job.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy cảm thấy chán nản sau khi mất việc.

words.definition: Extremely upset and shocked
words.example: She was devastated by the news of her cat's death.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy suy sụp trước tin con mèo của mình qua đời.

words.definition: Upset because something you hoped for did not happen
words.example: He was disappointed that he didn't get the promotion.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy thất vọng vì không được thăng chức.

words.definition: Having lost hope or enthusiasm
words.example: Don't get discouraged if you fail the first time.
words.exampleVi: Đừng nản chí nếu bạn thất bại lần đầu.

words.definition: Feeling strong dislike or disapproval
words.example: He was disgusted by the way the animals were treated.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy ghê tởm trước cách đối xử với động vật.

words.definition: Very interested and excited by something
words.example: The kids are eager to start the game.
words.exampleVi: Lũ trẻ háo hức muốn bắt đầu trò chơi.

words.definition: Very happy, excited and enthusiastic
words.example: They were ecstatic when their team won.
words.exampleVi: Họ đã ngây ngất khi đội của mình giành chiến thắng.

words.definition: Very happy and excited because of something good
words.example: She was elated after her successful surgery.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy hân hoan sau ca phẫu thuật thành công.

words.definition: Shy, awkward or ashamed, especially in a social situation
words.example: I was so embarrassed when I forgot her name.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã rất bối rối khi quên tên cô ấy.

words.definition: Wanting to be in the same situation as someone else
words.example: She was envious of her friend's new house.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy ghen tị với ngôi nhà mới của bạn mình.

words.definition: Feeling or showing happiness and enthusiasm
words.example: The children were excited about the trip to the zoo.
words.exampleVi: Lũ trẻ hào hứng với chuyến đi chơi sở thú.

words.definition: Very tired
words.example: He was exhausted after the long run.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy kiệt sức sau cuộc chạy dài.

words.definition: Nervous and afraid of something
words.example: She felt fearful about walking home alone at night.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy cảm thấy sợ hãi khi đi bộ về nhà một mình vào ban đêm.

words.definition: Feeling annoyed and impatient because you cannot do something
words.example: He gets frustrated when he can't solve a problem.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy bực bội khi không thể giải quyết một vấn đề.

words.definition: Very angry
words.example: She was furious when she found out he had lied.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đã điên tiết khi phát hiện anh ta đã nói dối.

words.definition: Happy and pleased
words.example: I'm so glad to see you again.
words.exampleVi: Tôi rất vui được gặp lại bạn.

words.definition: Nearly dark, or causing a person to feel sad
words.example: He was in a gloomy mood after the meeting.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy có tâm trạng buồn rầu sau cuộc họp.

words.definition: Feeling or showing thanks
words.example: I am so grateful for all your help.
words.exampleVi: Tôi rất biết ơn vì sự giúp đỡ của bạn.

words.definition: Feeling that you have done something wrong
words.example: He felt guilty about leaving his children at home.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy cảm thấy có lỗi khi để con ở nhà.

words.definition: Feeling or showing pleasure and contentment
words.example: Everyone wants to lead a happy life.
words.exampleVi: Ai cũng muốn dẫn dắt một cuộc sống hạnh phúc.

words.definition: Believing that something you want will happen
words.example: We are hopeful that a solution will be found.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi hy vọng rằng một giải pháp sẽ được tìm thấy.

words.definition: Feeling or showing horror
words.example: He was horrified by what he saw.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy khiếp sợ trước những gì mình thấy.

words.definition: Very unfriendly or aggressive
words.example: The crowd became increasingly hostile.
words.exampleVi: Đám đông ngày càng trở nên thù địch.

words.definition: Annoyed by somebody/something, especially because you have to wait
words.example: She was getting impatient with the delay.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đang dần mất kiên nhẫn với sự trì hoãn.

words.definition: Having no interest in someone or something
words.example: He was indifferent to their problems.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy thờ ơ với những vấn đề của họ.

words.definition: Not confident about yourself or your relationships
words.definitionVi: Thiếu tự tin, không an tâm
words.example: She felt insecure about her appearance.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy cảm thấy thiếu tự tin về ngoại hình của mình.

words.definition: Feeling angry or unhappy because you wish you had something that somebody else has
words.example: He was jealous of his brother's success.
words.exampleVi: Anh ta ghen tị với thành công của anh trai mình.

words.definition: Very happy
words.example: It was a joyful occasion for the whole family.
words.exampleVi: Đó là một dịp hân hoan cho cả gia đình.

words.definition: Unhappy because you are alone or do not have any friends
words.example: He felt lonely in the big city.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy cảm thấy cô đơn trong thành phố lớn.

words.definition: Very unhappy or uncomfortable
words.example: She felt miserable after her dog died.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy cảm thấy đau khổ sau khi con chó của mình chết.

words.definition: Anxious about something or afraid of something
words.example: I always get nervous before an exam.
words.exampleVi: Tôi luôn thấy hồi hộp trước mỗi kỳ thi.

words.definition: Having a feeling of sadness mixed with pleasure when you think of happy times in the past
words.example: Thinking about my childhood makes me feel nostalgic.
words.exampleVi: Nghĩ về tuổi thơ khiến tôi thấy hoài niệm.

words.definition: Expecting good things to happen or something to be successful
words.example: She is optimistic about the future of the company.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy lạc quan về tương lai của công ty.

words.definition: Feeling a strong emotional effect that you do not know how to react to
words.example: He was overwhelmed by the kindness of strangers.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy choáng ngợp trước lòng tốt của những người lạ.

name: Business & Finance
description: Essential vocabulary for commerce, banking, and financial management

words.definition: An arrangement that somebody has with a bank to keep money there
words.example: I need to open a bank account.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần mở một tài khoản ngân hàng.

words.definition: A notice, picture or film telling people about a product, job or service
words.example: She saw an advertisement for a new car.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy thấy một mẩu quảng cáo về chiếc xe hơi mới.

words.definition: An official examination of business and financial records
words.example: The company undergoes an annual audit.
words.exampleVi: Công ty trải qua một cuộc kiểm toán hàng năm.

words.definition: The amount of money that somebody has in their bank account
words.example: I need to check my account balance.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần kiểm tra số dư tài khoản của mình.

words.definition: An organization that provides financial services
words.example: I'm going to the bank to withdraw some cash.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đang đi đến ngân hàng để rút một ít tiền mặt.

words.definition: A document that shows how much money you owe for goods or services
words.example: Don't forget to pay the electricity bill.
words.exampleVi: Đừng quên thanh toán hóa đơn tiền điện.

words.definition: An official paper given by the government or a company to show that you have lent them money
words.example: He invested all his savings in government bonds.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đầu tư toàn bộ tiền tiết kiệm vào trái phiếu chính phủ.

words.definition: The money that is available to a person or an organization and a plan of how it will be spent
words.example: We need to stay within our budget for the project.
words.exampleVi: Chúng ta cần giữ cho dự án nằm trong ngân sách.

words.definition: The activity of making, buying, selling or supplying goods or services for money
words.example: He started his own business last year.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy bắt đầu công việc kinh doanh riêng vào năm ngoái.

words.definition: A large amount of money that is invested or is used to start a business
words.example: They need more capital to expand the factory.
words.exampleVi: Họ cần thêm vốn để mở rộng nhà máy.

words.definition: Money in the form of coins or notes
words.example: Do you have any cash on you?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có mang theo tiền mặt không?

words.definition: A printed form that you can write on and sign as a way of paying for something instead of using money
words.example: I'll pay for the rent with a check.
words.exampleVi: Tôi sẽ trả tiền thuê nhà bằng séc.

words.definition: The buying and selling of goods and services
words.example: The internet has revolutionized global commerce.
words.exampleVi: Internet đã cách mạng hóa thương mại toàn cầu.

words.definition: A business organization that makes or sells goods or services
words.example: She works for a large insurance company.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy làm việc cho một công ty bảo hiểm lớn.

words.definition: A person who buys goods or services for their own use
words.example: Consumers are demanding more environmentally friendly products.
words.exampleVi: Người tiêu dùng đang yêu cầu các sản phẩm thân thiện với môi trường hơn.

words.definition: An official written agreement
words.example: He signed a three-year contract with the firm.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã ký hợp đồng ba năm với công ty.

words.definition: An arrangement to receive goods or services now and pay for them in the future
words.example: Can I buy this on credit?
words.exampleVi: Tôi có thể mua cái này bằng tín dụng không?

words.definition: The system of money that a country uses
words.example: The euro is the currency used in many European countries.
words.exampleVi: Đồng euro là tiền tệ được sử dụng ở nhiều quốc gia châu Âu.

words.definition: A sum of money that somebody owes
words.example: He's trying to pay off his gambling debts.
words.exampleVi: Anh ta đang cố gắng trả nợ cờ bạc của mình.

words.definition: The amount by which money spent is more than money received
words.example: The trade deficit reached a record high last month.
words.exampleVi: Thâm hụt thương mại đạt mức kỷ lục vào tháng trước.

words.definition: A sum of money that is given as the first part of a larger payment
words.example: We had to pay a one-month deposit on the apartment.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi phải trả một tháng tiền đặt cọc cho căn hộ.

words.definition: An amount of money that is taken off the usual cost of something
words.example: They offer a 10% discount for cash payments.
words.exampleVi: Họ giảm giá 10% cho thanh toán bằng tiền mặt.

words.definition: A part of a company's profits that is paid to people who own shares in it
words.example: The company paid a generous dividend to its shareholders.
words.exampleVi: Công ty đã trả cổ tức hậu hĩnh cho các cổ đông.

words.definition: The relationship between production, trade and the supply of money in a particular country or region
words.example: The global economy is showing signs of recovery.
words.exampleVi: Nền kinh tế toàn cầu đang cho thấy những dấu hiệu phục hồi.

words.definition: A person who is paid to work for somebody else
words.example: The company has more than 500 employees.
words.exampleVi: Công ty có hơn 500 nhân viên.

words.definition: A person or organization that pays people to work for them
words.example: She is a fair and considerate employer.
words.exampleVi: Bà ấy là một người chủ công bằng và chu đáo.

words.definition: A company or business
words.example: He owns a small commercial enterprise.
words.exampleVi: Anh ta sở hữu một doanh nghiệp thương mại nhỏ.

words.definition: The process of changing one currency for another
words.example: What is the current exchange rate?
words.exampleVi: Tỷ giá hối đoái hiện tại là bao nhiêu?

words.definition: The money that you spend on something
words.example: We need to cut down our living expenses.
words.exampleVi: Chúng ta cần cắt giảm chi phí sinh hoạt.

words.definition: The management of large amounts of money
words.example: He works in corporate finance.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy làm việc trong lĩnh vực tài chính doanh nghiệp.

words.definition: An amount of money that has been saved or has been made available for a particular purpose
words.example: The school has a special fund for poor students.
words.exampleVi: Trường có một quỹ đặc biệt dành cho học sinh nghèo.

words.definition: The money that a person, a region, a country, etc. receives from work or investments
words.example: He has a high annual income.
words.exampleVi: Anh ta có thu nhập hàng năm cao.

words.definition: A general rise in the prices of services and goods
words.example: The rate of inflation is expected to rise next year.
words.exampleVi: Tỷ lệ lạm phát dự kiến sẽ tăng vào năm tới.

words.definition: An arrangement with a company in which you pay them regular amounts of money and they agree to pay the costs if you are ill or have an accident
words.example: Do you have health insurance?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có bảo hiểm y tế không?

words.definition: The extra money that you pay back when you borrow money or that you receive when you invest money
words.example: High interest rates make borrowing expensive.
words.exampleVi: Lãi suất cao làm cho việc vay mượn trở nên đắt đỏ.

words.definition: The act of investing money in something
words.example: The company has made a huge investment in new technology.
words.exampleVi: Công ty đã đầu tư một khoản khổng lồ vào công nghệ mới.

words.definition: A list of goods that have been sold or work that has been done showing what you must pay
words.example: Payment is due 30 days after the date of the invoice.
words.exampleVi: Việc thanh toán phải được thực hiện trong vòng 30 ngày kể từ ngày ghi trên hóa đơn.

words.definition: Money that an organization such as a bank lends and somebody borrows
words.example: I had to take out a loan to buy the car.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã phải vay một khoản để mua ô tô.

words.definition: Business or trade in a particular product
words.example: Is there a market for this kind of product?
words.exampleVi: Có thị trường cho loại sản phẩm này không?

words.definition: What you earn by working or use to buy things
words.example: Money can't buy happiness.
words.exampleVi: Tiền không thể mua được hạnh phúc.

words.definition: A legal agreement by which a bank or similar organization lends you money to buy a house
words.definitionVi: Thế chấp, khoản vay mua nhà
words.example: We applied for a 20-year mortgage.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã nộp đơn xin vay thế chấp trong 20 năm.

words.definition: A sum of money paid or expected to be paid
words.example: The first payment is due next month.
words.exampleVi: Khoản thanh toán đầu tiên đến hạn vào tháng tới.

words.definition: The money that you make in business or by selling things after paying the costs
words.example: The company made a healthy profit last year.
words.exampleVi: Công ty đã đạt được lợi nhuận khả quan vào năm ngoái.

words.definition: The act of buying something
words.example: The house was a major purchase for them.
words.exampleVi: Ngôi nhà là một khoản mua sắm lớn đối với họ.

words.definition: The money that a government or an organization receives from its business
words.example: The advertising revenue has increased significantly.
words.exampleVi: Doanh thu quảng cáo đã tăng lên đáng kể.

words.definition: Money that employees receive for doing their job, especially professional employees
words.example: The company offers a competitive salary.
words.exampleVi: Công ty đưa ra một mức lương cạnh tranh.

words.definition: Money that you have saved, especially in a bank
words.example: She spent all her savings on a new car.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đã tiêu hết tiền tiết kiệm vào một chiếc xe mới.

words.definition: A share that somebody has in a company
words.example: He invested in technology stocks.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đầu tư vào cổ phiếu công nghệ.

words.definition: Money that you have to pay to the government so that it can pay for public services
words.example: The government is planning to increase income tax.
words.exampleVi: Chính phủ đang lên kế hoạch tăng thuế thu nhập.

words.definition: The activity of buying and selling or of exchanging goods or services
words.example: International trade is essential for the economy.
words.exampleVi: Thương mại quốc tế là thiết yếu cho nền kinh tế.

name: City & Public Places
nameVi: Thành phố & Địa điểm công cộng
description: Vocabulary for urban environments and common facilities

words.definition: A narrow passage behind or between buildings
words.example: The cat ran down a narrow alley.
words.exampleVi: Con mèo chạy xuống một con hẻm hẹp.

words.definition: A wide street in a town or city
words.example: The hotel is located on Fifth Avenue.
words.exampleVi: Khách sạn nằm trên Đại lộ số 5.

words.definition: A building where you can keep your money safely
words.example: I'm going to the bank to deposit some money.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đang đi đến ngân hàng để gửi một ít tiền.

words.definition: A wide city street, often with trees on each side
words.example: We walked along the sunset boulevard.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đi bộ dọc theo đại lộ hoàng hôn.

words.definition: A structure that is built over a river, road, or railway
words.example: The Golden Gate Bridge is famous worldwide.
words.exampleVi: Cầu Cổng Vàng nổi tiếng khắp thế giới.

words.definition: A structure such as a house or school that has a roof and walls
words.example: The Empire State Building is very tall.
words.exampleVi: Tòa nhà Empire State rất cao.

words.definition: The main church of a district
words.example: St. Paul's Cathedral is in London.
words.exampleVi: Nhà thờ lớn St. Paul nằm ở London.

words.definition: An area of land used for burying dead people
words.example: He visited his grandfather's grave in the cemetery.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đến thăm mộ ông mình ở nghĩa trang.

words.definition: A building where Christians go to worship
words.example: The wedding was held in a small village church.
words.exampleVi: Đám cưới được tổ chức trong một nhà thờ nhỏ ở làng.

words.definition: A building in which films are shown
words.example: Let's go to the cinema tonight.
words.exampleVi: Tối nay chúng ta đi xem phim đi.

words.definition: A place where people go to receive medical treatment or advice
words.example: She works as a nurse at the local clinic.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy làm y tá tại phòng khám địa phương.

words.definition: A building containing a court or courts of law
words.example: The trial will take place at the city courthouse.
words.exampleVi: Phiên tòa sẽ diễn ra tại tòa án thành phố.

words.definition: A building or group of buildings where goods are made
words.example: He works in a car factory.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy làm việc trong một nhà máy sản xuất ô tô.

words.definition: A structure from which water is sent up into the air
words.example: There is a beautiful fountain in the middle of the park.
words.exampleVi: Có một đài phun nước tuyệt đẹp ở giữa công viên.

words.definition: A room or building for showing works of art
words.example: We visited an art gallery yesterday.
words.exampleVi: Hôm qua chúng tôi đã đến thăm một phòng trưng bày nghệ thuật.

words.definition: A building for keeping a car in
words.example: Put the car in the garage.
words.exampleVi: Đưa xe vào nhà để xe.

words.definition: A piece of land next to a house, used for growing flowers and vegetables
words.example: She loves working in her garden.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy thích làm việc trong vườn của mình.

words.definition: An area of water on the coast where ships can stay safely
words.example: The boat entered the harbor at sunset.

words.definition: A large system of connected parts, organizations or people
words.example: The television network reaches millions of viewers.
words.exampleVi: Mạng lưới truyền hình tiếp cận hàng triệu người xem.

words.definition: Information about recent events
words.example: I heard the news on the radio.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã nghe tin tức trên đài.

words.definition: A set of large printed sheets of paper containing news
words.example: Do you read a newspaper every day?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có đọc báo mỗi ngày không?

words.definition: Connected to the internet
words.example: I like to shop online.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thích mua sắm trực tuyến.

words.definition: A device used for talking to someone who is in another place
words.example: The phone is ringing.
words.exampleVi: Điện thoại đang kêu.

words.definition: A digital audio file that you can download from the internet
words.example: I listen to podcasts while I'm commuting to work.
words.exampleVi: Tôi nghe podcast khi đang đi làm.

words.definition: To publish a message or image on a social media website
words.example: She posted some photos from her vacation on Instagram.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đã đăng một vài bức ảnh từ kỳ nghỉ của mình lên Instagram.

words.definition: Newspapers and magazines collectively
words.example: The story made the front page of the national press.
words.exampleVi: Câu chuyện đã xuất hiện trên trang nhất của báo chí quốc gia.

words.definition: The state of being alone and not watched or disturbed by other people
words.example: Social media users are increasingly concerned about their privacy.
words.exampleVi: Người dùng mạng xã hội ngày càng lo ngại về sự riêng tư của họ.

words.definition: A broadcast on television or radio
words.example: I watched an interesting program about nature last night.
words.exampleVi: Tối qua tôi đã xem một chương trình thú vị về thiên nhiên.

words.definition: A book, magazine or newspaper that has been printed and is available for people to buy
words.example: The publication date of the new book is next month.
words.exampleVi: Ngày xuất bản của cuốn sách mới là vào tháng tới.

words.definition: The activity of keeping good relationships between an organization and the public
words.example: He works in the public relations department.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy làm việc ở bộ phận quan hệ công chúng.

words.definition: The activity of broadcasting programs for people to listen to
words.example: I listen to the radio while I'm driving.
words.exampleVi: Tôi nghe đài khi đang lái xe.

words.definition: A written or spoken account of something
words.example: The company published its annual report.
words.exampleVi: Công ty đã công bố báo cáo thường niên.

words.definition: A person whose job is to collect and report news
words.example: The reporter was at the scene of the accident.
words.exampleVi: Phóng viên đã có mặt tại hiện trường vụ tai nạn.

words.definition: An electronic device that is sent into space and moves around the earth
words.example: The game was broadcast via satellite.
words.exampleVi: Trận đấu được truyền hình qua vệ tinh.

words.definition: An electrical impulse or radio wave transmitted as a series of messages
words.example: The cell phone signal is very weak here.
words.exampleVi: Tín hiệu điện thoại di động ở đây rất yếu.

words.definition: Websites and applications that enable users to create and share content
words.example: Many companies use social media for marketing.
words.exampleVi: Nhiều công ty sử dụng mạng xã hội để làm marketing.

words.definition: A formal talk given to an audience
words.example: The president gave a moving speech on national television.
words.exampleVi: Tổng thống đã có một bài phát biểu đầy cảm động trên truyền hình quốc gia.

words.definition: A formal speech or lecture
words.example: He gave a talk on his experiences in Africa.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã có một bài nói về những trải nghiệm của mình ở châu Phi.

words.definition: A device used for talking to someone who is in another place
words.example: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell.
words.exampleVi: Điện thoại được phát minh bởi Alexander Graham Bell.

words.definition: A system for broadcasting moving pictures and sounds
words.example: The news is on television right now.
words.exampleVi: Tin tức đang được phát trên truyền hình ngay bây giờ.

words.definition: A short message sent from one mobile phone to another
words.example: Send me a text when you arrive.
words.exampleVi: Hãy gửi cho tôi một tin nhắn khi bạn đến nơi.

words.definition: A film or program that is recorded on a disc or in a computer file
words.example: We're making a video for our school project.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đang thực hiện một video cho dự án trường học.

words.definition: The sound produced in a person's larynx and uttered through the mouth
words.example: She has a very beautiful singing voice.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy có một giọng hát rất hay.

words.definition: A set of pages on the internet about a particular subject
words.example: Check out our new website for more information.
words.exampleVi: Hãy xem trang web mới của chúng tôi để biết thêm thông tin.
